title: Add members from conversations in group settings

requirements.text: In the group settings panel (inside GroupChatPage), replace the current principal-ID-based member input with a searchable list of users derived from the current user's existing direct message conversations. Display each conversation contact by their display name and username. Allow the group admin/creator to select one or more contacts from this list and add them as group members.

quotes: in the group setting, let me add members from conversation; not by principal id

acceptanceCriteria: The group settings panel no longer shows a raw principal-ID text input for adding members.
A searchable list or dropdown is shown, populated from the user's existing direct message conversation contacts.
Each contact entry displays the contact's display name and username (not their principal ID).
Selecting a contact and confirming adds them to the group chat.
All other group settings functionality (rename, change avatar, remove members, leave group, etc.) remains unchanged.
Users who are already members of the group are either hidden from the list or shown as disabled/already-added.

constraints: Do not modify any other group settings functionality beyond the add-member flow.
Do not alter backend data models or endpoints — use existing conversation and group chat queries.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Searching for users outside of existing conversations.
Changing the group chat messaging UI.
Any backend schema or API changes.
